subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou art He Who hath sustained the just monarchs, the munificent sovereigns, and the states [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت الذی ایدت الملوک العادله و السلاطین الباذله و الدول
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @justice and mercy, @prayer for governments and rulers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
